node.text:
Ali Sulais grew up listening to his grandmother’s stories, and learned to love the art of crafting a narrative. He published his first novel as a teenager, and then joined the iRead competition hosted by the King Abdulaziz Center for World Culture, Ithra.

Now an author of several books, as well as a Doctor of Psychology, Ali has served as a judge for the competition and gives back to the community that Ithra helped create.

#Aramco #RealStoriesInspire #Citizenship #Ithra

node.text:

⁣
Designed by Adrian Newey and powered by Aramco ProForce+, an FIA-compliant, 100% sustainable fuel, marking a new chapter for the partnership⁣
⁣
#aramco

node.text:
Through the supply of lower-carbon biofuel, we demonstrated their performance and consistency under the most demanding conditions, reinforcing our focus on supporting transport solutions⁣
⁣
#aramco

 ⁣
#aramco

node.text:

⁣

⁣
#aramco

node.text:

⁣
#aramco

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by aramco on January 08, 2026. May be an image of oil refinery and text.

node.text:
As we continue to deliver reliable energy to the world, our teams work around the clock, in coordinated shifts, to support one another and uphold the standards that keep our operations moving forward⁣
⁣
#aramco

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by aramco on January 08, 2026. May be an image of oil refinery and text.

node.text:

⁣
#aramco
